content: Framer Motion performance pitfalls on mobile: (1) layout animations measure DOM causing reflows - avoid on many children simultaneously. (2) Overusing will-change consumes GPU memory. (3) Always animate transform and opacity only for 60fps - these go to compositor thread. (4) AnimatePresence + lazy mounting can cause FOUC on mobile. (5) Mobile Chrome compositor thread is more constrained than desktop - heavy layer creation causes dropped frames. (6) layoutId across container hierarchies can cause unexpected layout shifts. (7) MotionValue objects update outside React render cycle - use them for high-frequency updates. (8) Use useReducedMotion hook for accessibility. (9) Framer Motion automatically applies will-change:transform during transitions but static elements should not have it set permanently.
